positive: A stylized, highly detailed mandala pattern combining bioluminescent deep-sea flora and celestial nebula elements. The composition is perfectly centered and symmetrical, featuring intricate, clean silhouettes of stylized coral structures interwoven with swirling galactic dust and stylized crescent moons. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep sapphire blue, emerald teal, glowing violet, and stark luminous white. The style should be hyper-detailed linework combined with smooth, flat vector-pop art coloring, giving it a seamless, repeating pattern suitable for apparel printing. Minimalist depth, strong outlines, clean geometry, mystical aesthetic, perfect symmetry.
